text:
Troy Trojans vs. Little Rock Trojans | Super Regional Highlights | ESPN College Baseball
Watch the highlights as the Troy Trojans defeat the Little Rock Trojans, 7-2, to win the Troy Super Regional and advance to their first-ever Men's College World Series.

text:
A'ja Wilson and Jackie Young combine for 55 PTS in clutch W over Valkyries | WNBA on ESPN
See highlights as A’ja Wilson (28 PTS, 14 REB & 3 AST) and Jackie Young (27 PTS, 5 REB, 5 AST) combined for 55 points to power the Las Vegas Aces past the Golden State Valkyries, 84-79, in a clutch finish.
